bucket_name.title: Bucket name
bucket_name.description: Google Cloud Storage bucket name, e.g., my_gcs_bucket

file_names_array.title: File names
file_names_array.description: File names in the Google Cloud Storage bucket

inputAttributes.placeholder: Download all files in the selected bucket

use_file_path.title: Use file path
use_file_path.description: If checked, the file path or pattern will be used instead of the file names.

file_name.title: File path
file_name.description: The path to the file or files. Example: "bucket/folder*/2023-*"

new_files_only.title: Download only new files
new_files_only.description: If set to true, only files updated after the component's last run will be downloaded.

options.tooltip: By default, this component stores results in File Storage. To convert them into tables, use a combination of processors. See examples in our documentation.

custom_tag.title: Custom tag (optional)
custom_tag.description: One or more tags, separated by a comma, will be added to Keboola Storage for all downloaded files.

permanent.title: Permanent files (optional)
permanent.description: If set to true, downloaded files will be stored in Keboola Storage permanently. Otherwise, they will be deleted after 14 days.
